values.description: graphrag neptune - read-cost backstop (query timeout) for text2sparql (ADR-0011)
VPC endpoint BedrockRuntime - accepts 443 from VPC
VPC endpoint CloudWatchLogs - accepts 443 from VPC
VPC endpoint EcrApi - accepts 443 from VPC
VPC endpoint EcrDocker - accepts 443 from VPC
VPC endpoint Sts - accepts 443 from VPC
MCP tool-server lambda - in-VPC compute (egress to stores + VPC endpoints)
query lambda - in-VPC compute (egress to stores + VPC endpoints)
IngestionSg egress to s3 prefix list 443

corpus_bucket_name.description: Name of the S3 corpus bucket.

ecs_cluster_name.description: Name of the ECS cluster running the Fargate ingestion task.

git_mirror_bucket_name.description: Name of the S3 bucket used as the CodePipeline git mirror artifact store (GIT_MIRROR_BUCKET env var for the Fargate ingestion task).

git_mirror_pipeline_name.description: Name of the CodePipeline pipeline that mirrors the GitHub repository to S3 on each push.

ingestion_repo_uri.description: ECR repository URI for the ingestion container image.

ingestion_security_group_id.description: Security group ID attached to the Fargate ingestion task.

ingestion_task_def_arn.description: ARN of the Fargate ingestion task definition.

mcp_api_gateway_url.description: HTTP API Gateway URL for the MCP tool-server (human / IDE ingress — rate-limited, x-api-key not enforced at edge).

mcp_function_url.description: IAM-auth Function URL for the MCP tool-server Lambda (automation + AgentCore ingress — SigV4).

neptune_endpoint.description: HTTPS endpoint for the Neptune cluster (port 8182).

opensearch_endpoint.description: HTTPS endpoint for the OpenSearch domain.

private_subnet_id.description: ID of the first private subnet (used by Fargate and Lambda).

query_function_url.description: Function URL for the IAM-auth query Lambda.

query_lambda_name.description: Name of the query Lambda function.

smoke_probe_name.description: Name of the Neptune smoke-probe Lambda function.

vector_smoke_probe_name.description: Name of the OpenSearch vector smoke-probe Lambda function.

description.constant_value: MCP tool server — human/IDE ingress (stage throttling only; x-api-key header not enforced at edge)
Trigger Fargate ingestion on CodePipeline git mirror success (ADR-0016).
graphrag neptune - read-cost backstop (query timeout) for text2sparql (ADR-0011)
MCP tool-server lambda - in-VPC compute (egress to stores + VPC endpoints)
query lambda - in-VPC compute (egress to stores + VPC endpoints)
IngestionSg egress to s3 prefix list 443

adot_layer_arn.description:
AWS ADOT Lambda Python 3.12 layer ARN for the deployment region.
Find the per-region ARN at: https://aws-otel.github.io/docs/getting-started/lambda/lambda-python
Format: arn:aws:lambda:<region>:901920570463:layer:aws-otel-python-amd64-ver-<X>-<Y>-<Z>:<build>
Default: us-east-1 ADOT 1.24.0 (Python 3.12 amd64). Update when a new ADOT version ships;
there is no auto-update mechanism (ADR-0015 Negative consequences).

budget_alarm_email.description: Email address that receives the AWS Budgets cost alarm.

codestar_connection_arn.description:
ARN of the AWS CodeStar Connections connection to GitHub. Created via the AWS Console
(Connections → Create connection → GitHub) and must be in AVAILABLE status before the
CodePipeline pipeline can pull from GitHub. Terraform provisions the pipeline but
cannot complete the OAuth handshake.
Format: arn:aws:codestar-connections:<region>:<account-id>:connection/<uuid>

github_branch.description: Branch to mirror from the GitHub repository (default: main).

github_repo_id.description: GitHub repository to mirror (format: owner/repo, e.g. acme/biz-ops-docs). The CodePipeline source action mirrors this repo to S3 on each push.

invoker_role_arn.description: IAM role ARN permitted to invoke the query Function URL (SigV4).

mcp_invoker_role_arn.description: IAM role ARN permitted to invoke the MCP tool-server Function URL (SigV4 — automation and AgentCore).

user.description: User tag value (owner of the deployment).
